name: nova-pack
description: Self-packing tool — builds and bundles the Nova registry into a distributable artifact

name: nova-registry
description: Registry query engine — load, search, and resolve any Nova tool or AIS by name, category, or Fibonacci slot

name: nova-build
description: Platform build tool — runs the full ICP + Cloudflare build pipeline with φ-timed health checks

name: nova-deploy
description: Deployment tool — deploys canisters to ICP and workers to Cloudflare with atomic rollback

name: nova-test
description: Test runner with φ-scoring — runs all tests and scores coherence using golden ratio weighting

name: nova-lint
description: Code quality linter — runs biome + custom phi-coherence rules across the entire codebase

name: nova-doc
description: Documentation generator — extracts, formats, and publishes docs from source code and research papers

name: nova-scaffold
description: Scaffolding tool — generates new Nova tools, Cloudflare workers, Motoko canisters, and AIS from templates

name: nova-compress
description: Artifact compression — zlib/gzip/brotli compression with φ-optimal compression ratio targeting

name: nova-encrypt
description: Encryption engine — HMAC-SHA256 signing and AES-GCM encryption for all Nova artifacts and messages

name: nova-sign
description: GKP geometric signing — signs artifacts using the Geometric Key Protocol from protocols/

name: nova-version
description: Fibonacci version manager — computes next Fibonacci version, bumps slots, manages the version register

name: nova-sync
description: State synchronization — syncs Nova registry state across Cloudflare KV, ICP stable memory, and git

name: nova-audit
description: Audit trail logger — φ-hashed immutable audit log for all tool calls, AIS queries, and workflow triggers

name: nova-monitor
description: Platform health monitor — tracks all 73 CF workers, 8 ICP canisters, and 37 web workers with φ-beat heartbeat

name: nova-stream
description: SSE streaming pipeline — real-time event streams for agent responses, workflow progress, and AIS output

name: nova-query
description: Registry query and aquarium caller — search, resolve, and call any registered tool or AIS by any attribute

name: nova-transform
description: Data transformation pipeline — converts between JSON, YAML, TOML, JSONL, CSV, and binary formats

name: nova-cache
description: φ-TTL caching layer — caches tool outputs, AIS responses, and registry data with Fibonacci-timed expiry

name: nova-orchestrate
description: Full workflow orchestrator — triggers any of 27 GitHub Actions workflows, streams results, chains workflows
